commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a fallback in `resolveRuntimeModel` that synthesizes a minimal model for configured `agentRuntime` aliases missing from the discovered model registry.

PR surface: Source +13. Total +13 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Current source deterministically performs a strict `/btw` registry lookup, while current tests establish that normal turns route the same configured alias through `claude-cli`; the exact live failure was not independently executed in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The blocking defect is concrete and mechanically repairable on the branch: replace model synthesis with actual configured-runtime execution and add focused coverage; contributor-owned real behavior proof remains a separate merge gate.
